turns.name: Discover DC targets
turns.user: Discover DCs in scope and list the hostnames you can check in this session.

turns.name: Core port posture
turns.user: Check core AD connectivity posture for each DC: LDAP 389, LDAPS 636, GC 3268/3269, Kerberos 88, DNS 53.

turns.name: ADWS verification
turns.user: Check ADWS service health and responsiveness for AD0 and other discovered DCs, including whether the endpoint is reachable.

turns.name: Service-state evidence
turns.user: For failed ADWS/LDAP checks, include service state and relevant system evidence if available.

turns.name: Matrix output
turns.user: Return a side-by-side matrix per DC with pass/fail per port/service and brief evidence.

turns.name: Blast radius
turns.user: Classify if failures are host-local, subnet/site-local, or shared infrastructure.

turns.name: Likely causes
turns.user: Provide top likely cause categories (service down, firewall, DNS resolution, trust/auth path, transport issue) with confidence.

turns.name: Fast remediation
turns.user: Give a prioritized 30-minute remediation checklist for restoring ADWS and directory connectivity.

turns.name: Validation loop
turns.user: Provide a minimal re-test loop to confirm the fix without creating duplicate or noisy checks.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final ADWS/LDAP health findings in 6 bullets with UTC timestamps and key evidence.
